post.description: Register a new user via JSON and get an auth token.
Authenticate a user via JSON and set/get an auth token.
Log out the current user by clearing the session cookie.

schema.title: Response Logout User Auth Logout Post

post.description: Handle login submission, setting session token cookie.
Handle user registration, creating AppUser and ledger Account.

get.description: Clear the session token cookie and redirect to login.

post.description: Create an active fictional account and optionally credit its opening bankroll.

get.description: Retrieve a fictional account's current balance and status.

post.description: Execute one fictional deposit or withdrawal through the double-entry ledger.

get.description: List a newest-first paginated statement for one fictional account.

post.description: Verify that an account's materialized balance matches its posting sum.
Create a reusable manually-entered college-football team.
Create a scheduled game between two existing teams.

get.description: List games newest-first with optional status filter.

schema.title: Response List Games Endpoint Cfb Games Get

get.description: Retrieve a game with its manual markets and quotes.

post.description: Create a draft spread, moneyline, or total market for a game.
Add a manual quote to a draft market.

get.description: Compare provider observations without selecting a canonical line.

schema.title: Response Quote Comparison Endpoint Cfb Games  Game Id  Quote Comparison Get

get.description: Read chronological, bookmaker-specific pregame odds observations.

schema.title: Response Odds History Endpoint Cfb Games  Game Id  Odds History Get

put.description: Finalize a game and settle its pending simulated bets atomically.

Correct a finalized score and re-settle all affected bets.

Creates offsetting ledger entries to reverse prior payouts, re-settles
bets with the corrected score, and records an audit-trail entry.
Locally resolve held provider-score disagreement and settle atomically.
Complete a local human rationale review.

get.description: List review tasks as JSON, or render the local operator queue for browsers.

post.description: Claim a pending review for the named local operator.

get.description: Return a single review task as JSON or as an HTML card partial.

post.description: Complete a claimed review and return the updated task.

get.description: Retrieve comprehensive performance analytics for a fictional account.
List configured ingestion providers without disclosing credentials.

schema.title: Response List Provider Statuses Ingestion Providers Get

post.description: Trigger a game sync from the fixture feed.
Trigger a quotes sync from the fixture feed.
Trigger a scores sync from the fixture feed.
Settle all games with confirmed score agreement.

get.description: List all games with conflicted score sync state.

schema.title: Response List Conflicts Endpoint Ingestion Conflicts Get

post.description: Resolve a score conflict for a specific game.

get.description:
Health check endpoint verifying API and database connectivity.

Args:
    db: Database session dependency

Returns:
    Dictionary indicating status of API and database services

AccountCreate.title: AccountCreate
AccountCreate.description: Payload for creating a fictional simulation-credit account.

AccountResponse.title: AccountResponse
AccountResponse.description: Public representation of a fictional account.

GameCreate.title: GameCreate
GameCreate.description: Payload for manually creating a scheduled game.

GameResponse.title: GameResponse
GameResponse.description: Public representation of a game including its manual market intake.

ManualTransactionType.title: ManualTransactionType
ManualTransactionType.description: Manual cash actions that are available before wagering is implemented.

MarketCreate.title: MarketCreate
MarketCreate.description: Payload for a game market; quotes are created as a separate resource.

MarketResponse.title: MarketResponse
MarketResponse.description: Public representation of a market and any entered quotes.

MarketSelection.title: MarketSelection
MarketSelection.description: The available outcome selections across the supported market types.

MarketStatus.title: MarketStatus
MarketStatus.description: Whether a market has the quotes needed for future wagering.

OddsHistoryResponse.title: OddsHistoryResponse
OddsHistoryResponse.description: One immutable provider quote observation for charting line movement.

QuoteCreate.title: QuoteCreate
QuoteCreate.description: Payload for a manual American-odds quote.

QuoteResponse.title: QuoteResponse
QuoteResponse.description: Public representation of a market quote.

RationaleCategory.title: RationaleCategory
RationaleCategory.description: Typed categories for bet rationale, enabling analytics by reasoning type.

ReconciliationResponse.title: ReconciliationResponse
ReconciliationResponse.description: Result of a balance reconciliation check.

ReviewStatus.title: ReviewStatus
ReviewStatus.description: Lifecycle for asynchronous human rationale review.

ScoreCorrectionCreate.title: ScoreCorrectionCreate
ScoreCorrectionCreate.description: Payload for correcting a finalized game score.

ScoreResolutionCreate.title: ScoreResolutionCreate
ScoreResolutionCreate.description: Local operator decision for a held provider-score conflict.

ScoreSyncState.title: ScoreSyncState
ScoreSyncState.description: External-score confidence state used before automated settlement.

SportType.title: SportType
SportType.description: Supported sport categories. CFB is the initial sport; others may follow.

TeamCreate.title: TeamCreate
TeamCreate.description: Payload for a reusable college-football team.

TeamResponse.title: TeamResponse
TeamResponse.description: Public representation of a team catalog record.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description: Token response payload for JSON-based login/signup.

TransactionCreate.title: TransactionCreate
TransactionCreate.description: Payload for a manual deposit or withdrawal.

TransactionExecutionResponse.title: TransactionExecutionResponse
TransactionExecutionResponse.description: The new account posting and balance returned after a manual action.

TransactionResponse.title: TransactionResponse
TransactionResponse.description: Public representation of one signed account posting.

TransactionType.title: TransactionType
TransactionType.description: Economic event categories supported by the ledger.
